---
title: "The Gate of Paradise: A Dream of Easter Eve"
---

## The Gate of Paradise: A Dream of Easter Eve

**Author:** Edith Sophia Jacob
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** London: Nister

### Notes

This appeared originally in<i>MP</i> (June 1867) 534-43. The first edition was anonymous, but subsequent editions attribute it to Edith Sophia Jacob, and the 1918 edition includes a memoir by her brother the Rt. Rev. Edgar Jacob.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
